name: Diabetic Thanksgiving Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 package D-Zerta topping, whipped as directed
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in 1 cup warm water. Set aside to cool.
2. Mix together 22 packets of Sweet n' Low and graham cracker crumbs. Add melted margarine. Press 2 cups of the crumb mixture firmly into a 9 x 13 pan. Reserve the rest for the top.
3. Cream the remaining 22 packets of Sweet n' Low with the cream cheese. Stir in the prepared whipped topping. Pour the mixture over the crust and sprinkle with the remaining cracker crumbs.
4. Chill for 3-4 hours. The cheesecake also freezes well (approximately 37 calories per square), making 36 squares.
From: Home Cooking Magazine, November 1991 issue (submitted by Deanna Naivar, Temple, Texas)
